html:
Exclusive to:

Ancient Sanctum Stonework is a Turf Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. Its blueprint can be obtained by solving the Distilled Knowledge that gets from green Fountain of Knowledge in Sanctum.

In Sanctum, ground is covered by Ancient Sanctum Stonework with moss. Turfs here cannot be dug up. Plants cannot be planted on either type of Ancient Sanctum Stonework.

Trivia

  • The Ancient Sanctum Stonework was introduced in the Ancient Echoes update.

In Sanctum, ground is covered by Ancient Sanctum Stonework with moss. Turfs here cannot be dug up. Plants cannot be planted on either type of Ancient Sanctum Stonework.

'''Ancient Sanctum Stonework''' is a [[Turf]] [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. Its blueprint can be obtained by solving the [[Distilled Knowledge]] that gets from green [[Fountain of Knowledge]] in [[Sanctum]].

In Sanctum, ground is covered by Ancient Sanctum Stonework with moss. Turfs here cannot be dug up. Plants cannot be planted on either type of Ancient Sanctum Stonework.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* The Ancient Sanctum Stonework was introduced in the ''[[Ancient Echoes]]'' update.
